Create an author profile for a current u: Ṣẹda profaili onkọwe fun iroyin olumulo lọwọlọwọ. O le yan awọn olumulo ti a fun ni igbanilaaye lati ṣatunkọ awọn ifiweranṣẹ. Olumulo yii yoo ni anfani lati ṣe imudojuiwọn profaili wọn.
Create an author profile and a linked us: Ṣẹda profaili onkọwe ati iroyin olumulo ti a so pọ. Iroyin yii yoo wa ni ipa “Onkọwe Alejo” ati pe ko le wọle si dashboard WordPress tabi ṣe imudojuiwọn profaili wọn.
Create an author profile with no linked: Ṣẹda profaili onkọwe pẹlu iroyin olumulo ti a ko so pọ. Yiyan yii jẹ ina ṣugbọn o le ni awọn iṣoro ibamu pẹlu awọn akọle ati awọn afikun miiran.

How to generate and use a theme template: Báwo ni láti ṣe àtúnṣe àti lo fáìlì àpẹẹrẹ àkóónú

Create an empty php template file with y: Ṣẹda faili àpẹẹrẹ php ofo pẹlu slug faili ti o fẹ ninu %1s /publishpress-authors/author-boxes/ %2s folda ti akọle rẹ. %3s Fun apẹẹrẹ, faili naa le wa nibi: %4s /wp-content/themes/%5syour-theme-name%6s/publishpress-authors/author-boxes/my-first-custom-author-template.php %7s .
Copy the generated code and paste it ins: Daakọ koodu ti a ṣe ati lẹẹmọ sinu faili tuntun ti a ṣẹda.

Allow users to choose which Author Box i: Gba awọn olumulo laaye lati yan iru Apo Onkọwe wo ni a lo lori ọkọọkan ifiweranṣẹ.
With this shortcode you can display the: Pẹlu shortcode yii o le fi apoti onkọwe han ni eyikeyi apakan ti akoonu.
You can specify layout by using author b: O le ṣalaye apẹrẹ nipa lilo slug apẹrẹ apoti onkọwe. O le rii awọn alaye kikun ti gbogbo aṣayan apẹrẹ %1$s ninu itọsọna yii %2$s.
You can also decide whether or not to sh: O tun le pinnu boya lati fi akọle pataki han, lilo %1$s tabi %2$s.
You can load the authors for a specific: O le gbe awọn onkọwe fun ifiweranṣẹ kan, paapaa ti o ko ba wa ninu ifiweranṣẹ yẹn ni akoko yii. Fun apẹẹrẹ, shortcode yii yoo gbe awọn onkọwe fun ifiweranṣẹ pẹlu ID ti 32.
O le gbe awọn onkọwe fun olumulo kan pato nipa fifun ID olumulo. Fun apẹẹrẹ, shortcode yii yoo gbe onkọwe pẹlu ID olumulo ti 32
O le gbe awọn onkọwe fun onkọwe kan pato nipa fifun ID ọrọ onkọwe fun mejeeji alejo ati onkọwe olumulo. Fun apẹẹrẹ, shortcode yii yoo gbe onkọwe pẹlu ID ọrọ ti 32
If you are having problems showing Publi: Ti o ba ni iṣoro lati fi han awọn Onkọwe PublishPress lori awọn oju-iwe profaili onkọwe, o le lo shortcode yii ni isalẹ. Iṣeduro %s n ṣiṣẹ plugin naa lati gba Onkọwe lati oju-iwe profaili ati kii ṣe eyikeyi awọn ifiweranṣẹ miiran lori iboju kanna.
There is one final option to mention. Th: Iṣeduro ikẹhin kan wa lati mẹnuba. Eyi jẹ pupọ wulo ti o ba nlo akori tabi oluṣeto oju-iwe lati ṣe akanṣe awọn oju-iwe profaili Onkọwe ti o rii ni awọn URL bi /author/username/. O le lo shortcode atẹle lori oju-iwe awọn onkọwe lati fi han profaili onkọwe lọwọlọwọ. O kan nilo lati fi kun paramita %s.
You can load the authors belonging to a: O le gbe awọn onkọwe ti o jẹ ti awọn ẹka onkọwe pato nipa fifi slug ẹka tabi awọn slugs ti a ya sọtọ nipa koma fun diẹ ẹ sii ju ẹka kan lọ.
With this shortcode you can display the: Pẹlu shortcode yii o le fi han awọn orukọ onkọwe tabi eyikeyi aaye profaili ni eyikeyi apakan ti akoonu.
The authors data shortcode accepts field: Shortcode data awọn onkọwe gba paramita aaye gẹgẹbi: %1$s %2$s %3$s %4$s %5$s %6$s %7$s. O le wo awọn alaye kikun ati awọn paramita %8$s ninu itọsọna yii %9$s.
You can also specify the separator to be: O tun le ṣalaye akọtọ ti a yoo lo fun data awọn onkọwe pupọ.
You can retrieve a specific author by pr: O le gba onkọwe pato nipa fifi ID ọrọ onkọwe naa. Fun apẹẹrẹ, shortcode yii yoo gbe onkọwe pẹlu ID ọrọ ti 102.
You can also decide to return an array l: O tun le pinnu lati da pada atokọ awọn onkọwe nipa lilo user_objects="true" eyiti yoo da gbogbo awọn data onkọwe pada gẹgẹ bi atokọ. O le ṣayẹwo awọn alaye kikun ati awọn apẹẹrẹ lilo %2$s ninu itọsọna yii%3$s.
You can retrieve authors belonging to a: O le gba awọn onkọwe ti o jẹ ti ẹka Onkọwe pato nipa fifi slug ẹka tabi awọn slugs. Ya sọtọ awọn slugs mẹta pẹlu koma.
With this shortcode, you can show all th: Pẹlu shortcode yii, o le fi han gbogbo awọn onkọwe papo ni ifihan kan.
You can specify layout by using author b: O le tọka iṣeto nipa lilo slug iṣeto awọn apo onkọwe. O le wo awọn alaye kikun ti gbogbo aṣayan iṣeto %1$s ninu itọsọna yii %2$s. %3$s %4$s Shortcode yii tun n pese awọn iṣeto adani meji: %5$s %6$s.
You can define the number of layout colu: O le ṣe alaye nọmba awọn ọwọn iṣeto nipa lilo %1$s lati fi han awọn onkọwe ni awọn ọwọn 2.
You can choose the number of authors per: O le yan nọmba awọn onkọwe fun oju-iwe kan nipa lilo %1$s. %2$s Iṣakojọpọ yoo jẹ afikun laifọwọyi ti o ba nilo.
You can limit the result to only authors: O le ni idiwọ abajade si awọn onkọwe nikan ti a yan si awọn ifiweranṣẹ nipa lilo %1$s. %2$s Ni omiiran, lo %3$s lati fi han gbogbo awọn onkọwe, pẹlu awọn ti ko ni awọn ifiweranṣẹ.
You can limit the result to only guest a: O le ni idiwọ abajade si awọn onkọwe alejo nikan nipa lilo %1$s. %2$s Ni omiiran, %3$s yoo fi han awọn onkọwe nikan pẹlu akọọlẹ WordPress kan.
If you are using the authors_recent layo: Ti o ba nlo iṣeto authors_recent, o le ṣe alaye nọmba awọn ọwọn nipa lilo %1$s.
For authors_index layout, you can group: Fun iṣeto authors_index, o le kó awọn olumulo pọ nipasẹ aaye profaili nipa lilo %1$s.
To order the results based on post count: Lati paṣẹ awọn abajade da lori nọmba awọn ifiweranṣẹ, lo %1$s. Lati paṣẹ awọn abajade nipasẹ orukọ, lo %2$s. Ni omiiran, o le paṣẹ nipasẹ awọn aaye profaili bii %3$s, %4$s ati bẹbẹ lọ.
To further customize the order of result: Lati tun ṣe akanṣe aṣẹ awọn esi, lo %1$s tabi %2$s .
To display a search box for authors, use: Lati ṣe afihan apoti wiwa fun awọn onkọwe, lo %1$s .
You can also show a dropdown menu that a: O tun le fi han akojọ aṣayan isalẹ ti o fun awọn olumulo laaye lati wa lori awọn aaye onkọwe pato. O le fi awọn aaye kun si akojọ aṣayan isalẹ nipa lilo %1$s. Eyi nilo ki apoti wiwa jẹ iṣẹ.
You can limit the author list to users w: O le ni idiwọ atokọ onkọwe si awọn olumulo pẹlu ifiweranṣẹ ti a tẹjade laarin akoko pato nipa lilo %1$s. Eyi gba iye ọjọ Gẹẹsi gẹgẹbi 1 ọsẹ sẹyin, 1 oṣu sẹyin, 6 oṣu sẹyin, 1 ọdun sẹyin ati bẹbẹ lọ.
Choose which WordPress user roles can be: Yan iru awọn ipa olumulo WordPress wo ni a le yan nipa lilo aṣayan "Onkọwe Ti a Forukọsilẹ Pẹlu Iṣẹ olumulo" fun awọn profaili onkọwe.
Author profiles can be mapped to WordPre: Awọn profaili onkọwe le jẹ asopọ si awọn iroyin olumulo WordPress. Eto yii n jẹ ki o ṣẹda awọn profaili onkọwe laifọwọyi nigbati awọn olumulo ba ṣẹda ni awọn ipa wọnyi. O tun le ṣe eyi fun awọn olumulo ti o wa tẹlẹ nipa titẹ bọtini "Ṣẹda Awọn Profaili Onkọwe PublishPress fun gbogbo awọn olumulo ni ipa" ninu taabu Itọju.
If the Author is mapped to a WordPress u: Ti a ba sopọ onkọwe si olumulo WordPress, eyi yoo fi hàn "Orukọ Ifihan" ti awọn onkọwe ati "Orukọ olumulo" wọn. Aiyipada ni lati fi hàn nikan "Orukọ Ifihan". Ifihan "Orukọ olumulo" jẹ wulo ti o ba ni ọpọlọpọ awọn onkọwe pẹlu awọn orukọ ti o jọra.
Allow authors to be created without a re: Gba laaye lati ṣẹda awọn onkọwe laisi iroyin olumulo gidi.
Show a profile checkbox allowing Authors: Fihan apoti akọsilẹ kan ti ngbanilaaye awọn Onkọwe lati wa ni yọkuro lati awọn apoti onkọwe.
Allow authors to be created without a co: Gba laaye lati ṣẹda awọn onkọwe laisi iroyin olumulo ti o ni asopọ.
If enabled, PublishPress Authors will re: Ti a ba mu ṣiṣẹ, Awọn Onkọwe PublishPress yoo rọpo awọn oju-iwe onkọwe aiyipada WordPress.
Please note this feature will not work f: Jọwọ ṣe akiyesi pe ẹya yii ko ni ṣiṣẹ fun gbogbo awọn akori.
Tẹ nibi fun alaye diẹ sii.

This will allows you map a WordPress use: Eyi yoo jẹ ki o sopọ olumulo WordPress si ju onkọwe kan lọ. Maṣe lo ẹya yii ayafi ti a beere lọwọ rẹ lati ṣe bẹ nipasẹ ẹgbẹ PublishPress. Ẹya yii ṣiṣẹ dara julọ nigbati awọn onkọwe ati awọn olumulo ba ni ibamu ọkan-si-ọkan.

This setting may be disabled for users w: Iṣeto yii le jẹ ti a ko ṣiṣẹ fun awọn olumulo ti ko le ṣatunkọ awọn ifiweranṣẹ miiran.
If you only have Guest Authors selected: Ti o ba ni awọn Onkọwe Alejo nikan ti a yan fun ifiweranṣẹ, olumulo yii le ṣee lo gẹgẹbi fallback. WordPress nigbagbogbo nilo ki a fi olumulo WordPress si iroyin kọọkan. Olumulo yii ko ni han lori iwaju aaye rẹ.

This will display the authors site in th: Eyi yoo ṣe afihan aaye ayelujara awọn onkọwe ni apoti onkọwe.

If a WordPress user is the author of a p: Ti olumulo WordPress ba jẹ onkọwe ti ifiweranṣẹ kan, ṣugbọn ko ni profaili Onkọwe PublishPress, eyi yoo ṣẹda profaili fun wọn laifọwọyi.

This will find all the users in a role a: Eyi yoo wa gbogbo awọn olumulo ni ipa kan ki o ṣẹda awọn profaili onkọwe fun wọn. O le yan awọn ipa nipa lilo eto "Ṣẹda awọn profaili onkọwe laifọwọyi".
Synchronize PublishPress Authors Fields: Sopọ Awọn aaye Onkọwe PublishPress ati awọn aaye profaili olumulo
This will update all the author profiles: Eyi yoo ṣe imudojuiwọn gbogbo awọn profaili onkọwe ni Awọn Onkọwe PublishPress lati ba awọn aaye aiyipada WordPress mu fun olumulo kọọkan.
Synchronize the author and user URLs: Sopọ awọn URL onkọwe ati olumulo
This will update all the Author URLs in: Eyi yoo ṣe imudojuiwọn gbogbo awọn URL Onkọwe ni Awọn Onkọwe PublishPress lati ba awọn URL aiyipada WordPress mu fun olumulo kọọkan.
This will create author categories table: Eyi yoo ṣẹda tabili awọn ẹka onkọwe ti o ba ṣofo ki o si fi awọn ẹka aiyipada kun.
This action will copy the authors from t: Igbese yii yoo daakọ awọn onkọwe lati plugin Co-Authors Plus ti o fun ọ laaye lati kọja si Awọn Onkọwe PublishPress laisi padanu eyikeyi data. Igbese yii le ṣee ṣe ni igba pupọ.
Delete Connections Between Author Profil: Pa Awọn Asopọ laarin Awọn Profaili Onkọwe ati Awọn olumulo
This action can reset the PublishPress A: Igbese yii le tun ṣe data Awọn Onkọwe PublishPress ṣaaju ki o to lo awọn aṣayan itọju miiran. Yoo pa gbogbo awọn profaili onkọwe ti a ti sopọ mọ iroyin olumulo WordPress. Eyi kii yoo pa awọn iroyin olumulo WordPress, ṣugbọn eyikeyi awọn ọna asopọ laarin awọn ifiweranṣẹ ati awọn profaili onkọwe yoo sọnu.
Delete all authors mapped to users: Pa gbogbo awọn onkọwe ti a ti ṣe iha si awọn olumulo
This action can reset the PublishPress A: Igbese yii le tun ṣe data Awọn Onkọwe PublishPress ṣaaju ki o to lo awọn aṣayan itọju miiran. Awọn onkọwe alejo ni awọn profaili onkọwe ti ko ni asopọ si iroyin olumulo WordPress. Igbese yii yoo pa gbogbo awọn onkọwe alejo.
Please be careful clicking these buttons: Jọwọ ṣọra nigbati o ba n tẹ awọn bọtini wọnyi. Ṣaaju ki o to tẹ, a ṣe iṣeduro lati mu afẹyinti aaye kan ni ọran ti ohunkohun ba ṣẹlẹ.
